feature_name: C64x+ VLIW core and instruction set
description: Fixed-point C64x+ DSP core with eight-issue VLIW; SIMD-style ops; caches and L2; deterministic timing needs careful scheduling and cache planning.
dependencies: None; optional cache/L2 configuration during early init

description: ~32 KB instruction cache reducing fetch latency; benefits from locality and function layout; consider L2 SRAM locking for determinism.
dependencies: Optional cache configuration during startup

description: ~32 KB data cache; align/pad to cache lines; coordinate with DMA to avoid coherency hazards.
dependencies: Cache maintenance or non-cacheable mapping for DMA buffers

description: Configurable as SRAM/cache/mixed; lock critical code/data for determinism; extends hot working set.
dependencies: Early boot L2 partitioning and attribute setup

description: CPU-triggered on-chip copies between L2/L1 for small deterministic moves; complements EDMA.
dependencies: None; coordinate with cache settings

description: JEDEC-compliant external SDRAM; program SDCR/SDTIMx/SDRCR and power-up sequence; validate with pattern tests.
dependencies: PSC enable; stable PLL/clock; board DDR parameters

description: High-throughput memory/peripheral transfers via PaRAM link/chain; queues/TCs; IPR/ICR and CCERR reporting.
dependencies: PSC enable for EDMA CC/TC; INTC mapping; event routing

description: 10/100/1000 EMAC with DMA descriptor rings; MDIO PHY management; ensure coherent descriptors.
dependencies: PSC enable; PINMUX; MDIO clock; external PHY; DMA rings; INTC

description: Conventional PCI host/target; config header and BARs; coordinate reset/negotiation; align endianness.
dependencies: PSC enable; host reset; BAR/window mapping; EDMA for bulk

description: Parallel host access to DSP memory map; HPIC/HPIA/HPID; polled or interrupt-driven.
dependencies: PSC enable; host timing/handshake; INTC if used

description: Point-to-point serial link mapping peer resources; configure lane rate/framing and address windows; verify mappings before DMA.
dependencies: PSC enable; PINMUX; peer configuration; address window mapping

description: TDM/I2S with SRGR clocks; RCR/XCR frame control; DRR/DXR data path; EDMA servicing.
dependencies: PSC enable; PINMUX; EDMA setup; INTC mapping

description: Multi-link telecom port with programmable framing and bit clocks; TX/RX time-slot transfers; FIFOs and status.
dependencies: PSC enable; PINMUX; EDMA channels; INTC mapping

description: Master/slave CPOL/CPHA; SPIFMT/SPIDELAY configure format/delays; EDMA for long transfers.
dependencies: PSC enable; PINMUX; CS wiring; optional EDMA/interrupts

description: Master/slave with prescaler and SCL low/high timing; ICMDR/ICSTR control/status; external pull-ups required.
dependencies: PSC enable; PINMUX; external pull-ups; INTC mapping

description: 16550-like UART with RX/TX FIFOs; DLL/DLH for baud; PWREMU_MGMT; interrupt or EDMA servicing.
dependencies: PSC enable; PINMUX; reference clock; INTC mapping

description: Up to 32 GPIO with direction/data control; edge-detect with banked interrupts; optional EDMA sync.
dependencies: PSC enable; PINMUX; INTC mapping; optional EDMA sync

description: 64-bit or dual 32-bit modes; periodic/one-shot; compare/overflow interrupts; capture/PWM via pinmux.
dependencies: PSC enable; INTC mapping; optional PINMUX for capture/PWM

description: Main PLL and peripheral dividers; lock/unlock and GO sequences; ensure stability before enabling DDR/high-speed IO.
dependencies: Stable reference clock; correct programming order; PSC sequencing

description: Power/clock gating by domain/module; transitions via PTCMD with PTSTAT/MDSTAT status.
dependencies: Required by all peripheral drivers; domain sequencing

description: Unlock KICK to write PINMUX; select functions to avoid conflicts; preserve reserved bits.
dependencies: KICK unlock sequence; ordered with PSC to avoid unsafe toggling

description: Event Combiner and INTMUX map events to CPU interrupts; clear peripheral status before ack.
dependencies: Peripheral enables; INTMUX mapping; optional combiner

description: Strap-selected boot (I2C/SPI/UART/PCI/UHPI); ROM loads first stage then app reprograms PLL/PSC/DDR.
dependencies: Board straps; ROM revision; external boot media

description: IDLE gates CPU clock; PSC can gate modules/domains; coordinate wake and data integrity.
dependencies: Wake interrupt routing; PSC configuration

description: JTAG halt/trace; emulation-aware controls in some peripherals; coordinate to avoid perturbing real time.
dependencies: External emulator; toolchain integration

description: Write-1-to-clear status; EDMA IPR/ICR/CCERR; centralize logging and counters.
dependencies: Per-driver ISR/polling; logging infrastructure

description: No public secure boot or crypto accelerators documented; assume none by default.
dependencies: UNKNOWN

description: Cacheability and address extension for external regions; align DMA buffers and mark MMIO non-cacheable.
dependencies: Privileged CPU configuration coordinated with cache and DMA usage
